meta.title: Aluminium Doors | Slim Profile, Maximum Glass | DECA Windows
meta.description: Premium aluminium doors with thermal break technology. Slim sightlines, maximum glass area, superior structural strength for large openings. Manufactured in Massachusetts.

hero.title: Aluminium Doors
hero.description: Slim aluminium profiles with thermal break technology. Maximum glass area, modern aesthetics, and exceptional structural strength — ideal for large openings, contemporary architecture, and commercial applications.
hero.photoDescription: Фото: алюминиевая дверь DECA — тонкий профиль, панорамное остекление, современный фасад

advantages.title: The Advantages of Aluminium Doors
advantages.subtitle: Modern engineering meets timeless design — aluminium delivers where other materials can't.

items.title: Slim Sightlines
items.description: Ultra-narrow profiles maximize glass area for unobstructed views. Face widths as slim as 65mm create a sleek, contemporary look.

items.title: Superior Strength
items.description: Aluminium's inherent structural strength supports larger and heavier door panels without compromising performance or security.

items.title: Thermal Break Technology
items.description: Polyamide insulation strips within the profile create an effective thermal barrier, preventing heat transfer and condensation.

items.title: 200+ RAL Colors
items.description: Choose from over 200 RAL colors with powder-coated finishes. Dual-color options available — different colors inside and outside.

items.title: Corrosion Resistant
items.description: Aluminium naturally forms a protective oxide layer. Combined with powder coating, it resists corrosion even in coastal environments.

items.title: Large Openings
items.description: Support for oversized panels — up to 3 meters tall and beyond. Perfect for floor-to-ceiling glass walls and grand entrances.

profiles.title: Aluminium Profile Systems
profiles.subtitle: German-engineered aluminium profiles with integrated thermal break for optimal performance.

items.title: Standard Aluminium Profile
items.description: 65mm frame depth with polyamide thermal break. Ideal for standard door applications with excellent thermal and acoustic performance.
items.imageAlt: Standard aluminium door profile with thermal break

items.title: Heavy-Duty Aluminium Profile
items.description: Premium profile for oversized doors and high-traffic commercial applications. Enhanced reinforcement for maximum weight capacity.

specs.title: Technical Specifications
specs.profileImageAlt: Aluminium door profile showing thermal break technology and multi-chamber design

applications.title: Perfect for Every Application
applications.subtitle: Aluminium doors excel in both residential and commercial settings.

items.title: Modern Homes
items.description: Floor-to-ceiling glass walls, pivot doors, and minimalist entrance systems.
items.photoDescription: Фото: современный дом с алюминиевыми дверями от пола до потолка

items.title: Commercial Buildings
items.description: Storefronts, office entrances, and high-traffic public spaces.
items.photoDescription: Фото: коммерческое здание с алюминиевым входом и витриной

items.title: Grand Entrances
items.description: Oversized entry doors with sidelights and transoms for impressive facades.
items.photoDescription: Фото: парадный вход с высокой алюминиевой дверью и боковыми панелями

colors.title: 200+ RAL Color Options
colors.subtitle: Complete color freedom with powder-coated finishes. Dual-color available — different colors inside and outside.

gallery.title: Aluminium Doors in Real Projects
gallery.subtitle: DECA aluminium doors installed across New England.

items.description: A practical comparison to help you choose the right material for your project.

cta.title: Ready for Premium Aluminium Doors?
cta.subtitle: Get your custom order form, door blueprints, and detailed specification — all prepared for your project.

items.a: Yes. Modern aluminium profiles with thermal break technology achieve excellent U-values. With triple glazing, our systems reach U-values as low as 0.12 W/m²K — exceeding Passive House requirements.

items.q: How do aluminium doors compare to uPVC?
items.a: Aluminium offers slimmer profiles (more glass), greater structural strength (larger openings), and 200+ color options. uPVC is more affordable and has slightly better thermal frame values. Both are excellent choices.
No. Aluminium naturally forms a protective oxide layer, and our powder-coated finishes add another layer of protection. DECA aluminium doors are rated for 60+ years, even in coastal environments.

items.q: What is the maximum size for aluminium doors?
items.a: Standard aluminium doors can reach up to 3 meters tall and 1.4 meters wide per leaf. For larger openings, our sliding and multi-panel systems can span even wider.

items.q: Can I get different colors inside and outside?
items.a: Absolutely. Dual-color options are available — choose one color for the interior to match your decor and a different color for the exterior to complement your facade.

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Modern aluminium profiles with thermal break technology achieve excellent U-values. With triple glazing, DECA aluminium door systems reach U-values as low as 0.12 W/m²K — exceeding Passive House requirements.

mainEntity.name: How do aluminium doors compare to uPVC doors?

acceptedAnswer.text: Aluminium offers slimmer profiles (more glass area), greater structural strength (supports larger openings), and 200+ RAL color options. uPVC is more affordable and has slightly better thermal frame values. Both are excellent choices depending on your priorities.

mainEntity.name: Do aluminium doors corrode over time?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Aluminium naturally forms a protective oxide layer, and powder-coated finishes add another layer of protection. DECA aluminium doors are rated for 60+ years of service, even in coastal environments with salt air exposure.

mainEntity.name: What is the maximum size for aluminium doors?

acceptedAnswer.text: Standard DECA aluminium doors can reach up to 3 meters tall and 1.4 meters wide per leaf. For larger openings, sliding and multi-panel aluminium systems can span significantly wider with multiple tracks.
